# NZ Life Skills

> Agent-friendly New Zealand life skills for international students and newcomers.

This repository contains reusable skills for Codex and Claude Code.

## Canonical URLs

- Repository: https://github.com/pengqianhan/NZ-life-skills
- English README: https://github.com/pengqianhan/NZ-life-skills/blob/main/README.md
- Chinese README: https://github.com/pengqianhan/NZ-life-skills/blob/main/README.zh-CN.md
- Agent guide: https://github.com/pengqianhan/NZ-life-skills/blob/main/docs/for-agents.md
- Skills index: https://github.com/pengqianhan/NZ-life-skills/blob/main/docs/skills-index.md

## What This Repo Covers

- Kiwi Access Card
- IRD number onboarding
- New Zealand bank account setup
- SIM and eSIM setup
- Public transport setup
- Renting basics
- Healthcare access

## Usage Rules

- Prefer official sources over third-party summaries.
- Treat fees, eligibility, document requirements, and application workflows as temporally unstable.
- Verify current official sources before answering `current`, `latest`, `today`, pricing, or eligibility questions.
- Update the repository reference files if official guidance changes.

## Primary Documents

- README.md
- README.zh-CN.md
- docs/for-agents.md
- docs/skills-index.md
- skills/*/SKILL.md
- skills/*/references/*
